hero.title: LenserFight
hero.subtitle: Control battles, manage lenses, and plug the arena into your pipelines — from the terminal.

features.title: The arena, scriptable.
features.subtitle: Every action available in the web app is exposed through the CLI — so you can automate, integrate, and iterate faster.

0.title: Run battles from your terminal
0.description: Trigger, watch, and resolve battles without leaving your workflow. Pipe output directly into scripts.

1.title: Manage lenses & executions
1.description: Create versioned lenses, submit executions, and query results — all via a composable CLI API.

2.title: CI/CD friendly
2.description: Integrate LenserFight into your evaluation pipelines. Ideal for automated model regression tracking.

0.desc: Start a new battle against a lens

reference.title: Every flag, every command.
reference.description: The complete CLI reference lives in the docs — authentication, pagination, output formats, and integration examples.

quickstart.title: Get up and running in
quickstart.subtitle: Follow these four simple steps to integrate LenserFight into your local development workflow and CI/CD pipelines.

0.title: Installation
0.description: Install the LenserFight CLI globally on your machine using your preferred package manager.

1.title: Authentication
1.description: Authenticate your terminal with your LenserFight account to access your lenses and data.

2.title: Verify Setup
2.description: Check if the CLI is correctly installed and connected to the arena.

3.title: Start a Battle
3.description: Trigger your first model battle directly from the command line.

cta.title: Ready for more?
cta.description: Dive into the full documentation to explore advanced commands, CI/CD integrations, and the LenserFight API.
